title: Carrie Lam ditches meeting US Senator Ted Cruz

replies.msg:
US Senator Ted Cruz met the reporters, wearing black to show support to pro-democracy protesters in Hong Kong, and talked about Hong Kong Chief Executive Carrie Lam’s cancelling the meeting.

“She seems to misunderstand how free speech operates, and also how freedom of the press operates," said Cruz, a Republican senator from Texas.

"Ms. Lam's cancelling the meeting is not a sign of strength. It's a sign of weakness. It's a sign of fear of the protesters in the streets of Hong Kong."

https://www.reuters.com/article/us-hongkong-protests-cruz/hk-leader-ditches-meeting-ted-cruz-says-the-u-s-senator-idUSKBN1WR0B7

You can comment here thru Twitter, https://twitter.com/reuters/status/1182978276937129985?s=21
